title: shaqaph #8259
definition:
1) to overlook, look down or out, overhang, look out and down
    1a) (Niphal) to lean over (and look), look down
    1b) (Hiphil) to look down, look down upon
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to overlook, look down or out, overhang, look out and down
    1a) (Niphal) to lean over (and look), look down
    1b) (Hiphil) to look down, look down upon

    NASB:  to overhang, look out or down
